title: Copy Folders, Not just boards
excerpt: We work in Monday and heavily use the folder sections, to section into months / jobs.  We have separate boards within each folder / subfolder. There is still not a feature to copy multiple boards from one folder or to co…

posts.author: eryn.jayne (eryn.jayne)
posts.cookedHtml:
We work in Monday and heavily use the folder sections, to section into months / jobs. We have separate boards within each folder / subfolder. There is still not a feature to copy multiple boards from one folder or to copy a folder whole.

I can see there has been a request back in 2019, this still hasn’t been developed as a feature.

posts.author: Avis682Holmes (Avis682Holmes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I understand how frustrating it can be to not have the ability to copy multiple boards or folders in Monday.com, especially when organizing work by months and jobs. It seems like this feature has been requested before but hasn’t been developed yet.

You might want to suggest this feature again through Monday.com’s feedback channels or community forums.

posts.author: arun.paudyal (Arun Paudyal [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @eryn.jayne

I’m Arun, Product Owner at Decadis AG. Based on your use case, I believe our app, Batch Hero for monday, offers a partial solution to what you’re looking for.

(For fullscreen view, right click on gif and select “Open Image in New Tab”)

Batch Hero is capable of individual or batch copy of boards into desired workspace or folder . As of now, we do not support copying of folders, but that’s a nice request and we will keep it under our radar for further investigation.

And the best part? The app is still free!

Give it a try and see it for yourself. If you have further questions or would like to discuss your use cases, kindly reach out to us.

Best,
Arun
